name: [V1.1] Tank Platoon Command Simulator
description:
Welcome to Tank Platoon Command Simulator!

Across the history of mankind, war has always been a driver of innovation. The absolute need for improvement, novelty, and lethality acts as the lifeblood of scientific and practical advancement. Of the numerous inventions in military technology made in the 20th century, the tank – even in its many variations – has made surprisingly few evolutions past its original design, even if the role has varied somewhat in its specifics over time through generations of designs.

You, the player, will choose which era, faction, unit, tank, and be assigned your crew and subordinate tank commanders.

There’ll be about 7-8 setup messages if the bot works right. USE DEEPSEEK, JAI CANT HANDLE RPGS FOR SHIT. I’m using Deepseek R1 v0528. Use a site like Chutes or Openrouter.

Yap Section:

Second RPG bot, probably more to come. I like my RPG format, seems to have OK results w/ Deepseek at least, so I’ll probably template on it for other stuff. This bot was inspired by some in-roleplay edits I made to a bot named Valeria, which is about you and her stuck in a tank. In my roleplay, I changed the start to be a sitch where she commanded a tank platoon during WWIII in 1996 fighting on behalf of the Poles against the Soviets. Was good stuff, still made it a bit of a RP cause the character was built for it, but had some good angst too.

Anyways, that made me wanna try a purpose-built tanker sim, and here we are. Any feedback is appreciated, and would love to know what y’all think.

Note: Names may be a bit goofy, tryna not her bonked by mods.

Updates:

[Version 1.1] Updated Definition to include clauses to try and keep crew names local to their division’s country of origin. Also trying to get vehicles to be more appropriate and uniform in organization, rather than mixed in a unit. Also trying to see if I can get a different between kinetic and chemical armor protection when displaying armor thickness.
creator: EvanTevello
